ocr_findings.description: CBT screen example (screenshot of exam interface with table showing production data, answer choices ア20/イ21/ウ22/エ23, and UI buttons) rendered as image placeholder img-0.jpeg — table content and UI labels inside the screenshot are not OCR'd, but this is expected for embedded screenshots
Two QR codes at bottom of page (for CBT操作説明 and CBT疑似体験ソフトウェア URLs) rendered as img-2.jpeg placeholder; URLs themselves are correctly captured as text

reviewer_notes: CBT方式 explanation page. All prose text, section headings, bullet points, and URLs faithfully reproduced. The embedded exam-UI screenshot and QR codes are appropriately replaced with image placeholders; text surrounding them is complete. Margin annotation '「後で見直すためにチェックする」' box callout on right side is captured within the section heading instead, which is acceptable.
